name: thermos
description: Thermo-nuclear branch review for Codex: deep correctness/security audits, strict maintainability rubrics, and subagent orchestration.

interface.shortDescription: Deep correctness/security and strict code-quality branch reviews.
interface.longDescription: Run paired Thermos review passes over a branch: one for correctness, security, devex, and feature-gate risk; one for strict maintainability and structural quality.
defaultPrompt: Use $thermos to review the current branch.
Run a thermo-nuclear review against main.
